name: Your Eldritch Goddess Patron: Kra'Katoe
description: Your Eldritch Goddess Patron: Kra'Katoe will take your firstborn child, whenever it would be born, as a payment for her services: She can use mystic portals to summon her own hands, feet, mouths, tentacles... what? She's an eldritch horror after all! You are free to command her. Just remember the deal...
creator: SwizzleRich
